attacks.title: Critical Palo Alto VPN bug now exploited by Qilin ransomware gang
attacks.desc: The Qilin ransomware gang is exploiting a critical PAN-OS GlobalProtect authentication bypass flaw to breach victims' networks, according to cybersecurity company Arctic Wolf. [...]

attacks.title: WordPress wp2shell Exploitation Grows as Public Exploit Fuels Mass Scanning
attacks.desc: Attackers have begun to exploit two critical vulnerabilities in WordPress that, when combined together, enable unauthenticated remote code execution (RCE) and complete compromise of vulnerable websites. The two security …

attacks.title: New ENCFORGE Ransomware Targets AI Model Files in Langflow RCE Attack
attacks.desc: Researchers at Sysdig have linked a second attack on the same Langflow server to JADEPUFFER, the AI-agent-driven operator it first documented earlier this month. The same operator has now been spotted deploying ENCFORGE,…

attacks.title: Critical ServiceNow AI Platform Flaw Exploited for Unauthenticated Code Execution
attacks.desc: Threat actors are now exploiting a recently disclosed critical security flaw impacting ServiceNow AI Platform, according to Defused Cyber. In a post shared on X, the threat intelligence firm said it's observing in-the-wi…

attacks.title: Estée Lauder discloses data breach via Oracle E-Business flaw
attacks.desc: Cosmetics giant Estée Lauder is notifying customers of a data breach after hackers exploited a flaw in Oracle E-Business Suite that the company used for human resources (HR) operations. [...]

attacks.title: SonicWall SMA1000 flaws exploited as zero-days to push custom malware
attacks.desc: Two recently disclosed SonicWall SMA1000 vulnerabilities were exploited in zero-day attacks for weeks, allowing threat actors to install custom malware on vulnerable VPN appliances. [...]

attacks.title: Hackers steal $23.7 million in crypto from Ostium in off-chain attack
attacks.desc: The Ostium trading platform announced that an attacker stole $23.75 million from its liquidity provider vault last week, after compromising off-chain infrastructure used to feed prices into the protocol. [...]

attacks.title: JadePuffer agentic attacks now target AI model data with ransomware
attacks.desc: The JadePuffer autonomous AI agent has upgraded with custom malware called EncForge that focuses on encrypting AI assets, such as training datasets, vector databases, and model checkpoints. [...]

attacks.title: New HollowGraph malware uses Microsoft Graph for stealthy C2 comms
attacks.desc: A malicious component dubbed HollowGraph uses the calendar feature in compromised Microsoft 365 mailboxes as a command-and-control channel to receive attacker commands and exfiltrate stolen data. [...]

attacks.title: HollowGraph Malware Hides C2 and Stolen Files in Microsoft 365 Events Dated 2050
attacks.desc: A newly discovered espionage implant has been using a hijacked Microsoft 365 calendar as its command channel, planting operator instructions and smuggling out stolen files as attachments on calendar events dated to the y…
